memoryArtifacts.headline: The family of John Howland, Mayflower passenger: five generations by Hunter, Mardenna Johnson, 1910- pg 1
Mayflower Families Through Five Generations Vol 23 Part I John Howland part 2 of 4
memoryArtifacts.description: If you are related to John Howland and Elizabeth Tilley then you are also related to three other Mayflower Pilgrims, John and Mrs. John Tilley and their daughter, Elizabeth Tilley.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lydia Howland於1633年2月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯時，她的父親John Howland35歲，母親Elizabeth Tilley11630歲。她於1655年與James Brown在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1711年1月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托斯萬希亞享年77歲，埋葬在美國羅得島普洛維登斯易亞斯特 普洛維登斯安希特 蕾托 內可 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lydia Howland于1633年2月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯时，她的父亲John Howland35岁，母亲Elizabeth Tilley11630岁。她于1655年与James Brown在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1711年1月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托斯萬希亞享年77岁，埋葬在美国罗德岛州普洛維登斯易亞斯特 普洛維登斯安希特 蕾托 內可 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Howland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Lydia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Greek origin, meaning ‘woman from Lydia’, an area of Asia Minor. The name is borne in the Bible by a woman of Thyatira who was converted by St Paul and who entertained him in her house (Acts 16:14–15, 40). It has enjoyed steady popularity in the English-speaking world since the 17th century.

historicEvents.description: Oldest grave seen in the memorials list.

en.lifeSummary: When Lydia Howland was born on 1 February 1633, in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Howland, was 35 and her mother, Elizabeth Tilley, was 11630. She married James Brown in 1655, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 11 January 1711, in Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 77, and was buried in Ancient Little Neck Cemetery, East Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lydia Howland est née le 1 février 1633, à Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Howland, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Tilley, avait 11630 ans. Elle a épousé James Brown en 1655, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 janvier 1711, à Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Ancient Little Neck Cemetery, East Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lydia Howland am 1. Februar 1633 in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Howland 35 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Tilley 11630. Sie hat 1655 in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America James Brown geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Januar 1711 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Ancient Little Neck Cemetery, East Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Howland è nata il il 1 febbraio 1633 nel Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Howland, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Tilley, aveva 11630 anni. Lei sposato James Brown nel 1655, nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 gennaio 1711, nel Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Ancient Little Neck Cemetery, East Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lydia Howlandが1633年2月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスで生まれた時，父John Howlandは35歳，母Elizabeth Tilleyは11630歳であった。1655年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーでJames Brownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1711年1月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルスワンセアで77歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州プロヴィデンスエアスト プロヴィデンスアンシエント リットル ネック セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lydia Howland(이)가 1633년 2월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Howland(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Tilley(은)는 11630세였다. 그녀는 1655년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 James Brown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1711년 1월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 스완시에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 로드아일랜드 주 플로비데스 이스트 플로비데스 앤시트 리틀 니크 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Howland nasceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1633, em Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Howland, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Tilley, tinha 11630 anos. Ela casou-se com James Brown em 1655, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de janeiro de 1711, em Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Ancient Little Neck Cemetery, East Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lydia Howland родилась 1 февраля 1633 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Howland было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Tilley, 11630. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Brown в 1655 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 11 января 1711 г. в местности свансеа, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности ансиент литл некк кеметири, эаст провиденс, провиденс, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con James Brown en 1655, en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas.
